content.en:
Ye Tian had just defeated the Black Striped True Monarch and was about to leave here.

Suddenly.

An invisible six-sided enchantment enveloped Ye Tian, and then ten True Monarchs appeared around Ye Tian.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian struck casually, trying to break the six-sided barrier, but found that he couldn't shake the barrier.

"What do you mean by that?"

One of the True Monarchs of the Void Heaven Hall said angrily.

"It's not interesting, I just want to learn from Wanfa Daozi!"

One after another, masked True Monarchs appeared, and their identities were also known to others, and they were the True Monarchs of the Dark Temple.

But the ten True Monarchs surrounding Ye Tian were not only the Dark God Temple, but also several other top powers.

"Demon Sound Sect!"

"Soul Eater Sect!"

"Blood Moon Pie!"

"Three-eyed tail horn clan!"

These four major forces have a bad relationship with the Void Heaven lineage, and they are all very weak.

Coupled with the Dark Temple, this time there will be a total of five major forces to attack!

"This is a strange thing! A strange thing like an enchantment, it seems to be a one-time strange thing, what a big deal!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"That's good!" Qi Mu Zhenjun, the representative of the Dark God Temple, who was ninth on the True Monarch List, said: "This is one of the Chaos Strange Things, the Six-Sided Dice, it is a one-time strange thing, with the strength of our True Monarch, this strange thing is stimulated, even the powerhouses of the middle stage of the True Ancestor don't want to break the barrier." Moreover, you should have discovered that your strength has been suppressed by more than seventy percent, while our strength has been increased, which is the magic of the six-sided dice, these six-sided dice are worth a Dao weapon, ten thousand Dao Zi, use this strange thing on you, you are proud!"

"You're going to kill me?"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"That's good!" Qi Mu Zhenjun said in a deep voice: "If you want to blame you, you are too demonic, the growth rate is too fast, and no more demonic genius in the chaos is as genius as you, even the legendary ten-star god will be promoted to the demon, it is far inferior to you." Therefore, the Dao Ancestors are afraid that you will soon be promoted to the True Ancestor realm, and you will soon be promoted to the Dao Ancestor, so they want to strangle you in advance!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

He was too good, a genius like him was already easy to promote to Dao Ancestors, coupled with the continuous appearance of the ruins of the Quasi-Dao Realm, in case he obtained some amazing inheritances, once he grew up, it might be enough to threaten those Dao Ancestors.

And when he grows up, the power of the Void Heaven is even stronger, which is a scene that some forces don't want to see.

Therefore, they did it to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian understood that at this moment, his master should also be restrained by other Dao Ancestors, and he would definitely not be able to support him, and when Dao Ancestors had not yet reached the end at this time, all Dao Ancestors would not allow the Void Heaven Dao Ancestors to come.

The other side.

Long Hai Zhenjun was furious, Ye Tian was his junior brother, he was the most demonic one in the history of the Void Heaven First Pulse, if it fell, the loss of the Void Heaven First Pulse would be too great.

He wanted to rescue Ye Tian, but the two half-step True Ancestors stopped him.

"Longhai Zhenjun, let's have a chat! Don't talk about you at this moment, all the forces that are friendly with the Void Heaven lineage, the half-step true ancestors of these forces are staring at. The entire Quasi-Dao Realm, even if it is a neutral force, will not rush to intervene, so no one will rescue the Ten Thousand Laws Dao!"

One of the half-step True Ancestors, the Ghost Shadow True Monarch, was gloomy.

"Dark Temple, Ghost Shadow True Monarch, do you Dark God Temple really want to start a war with our Void Heaven line?"

Long Hai Zhenjun said angrily.

"If you start a war, you will start a war, in the current situation, even the Dao Ancestors will fight at any time, and we don't have to worry about your Void Heaven Bloodline!" said the Ghost Shadow True Monarch.

-------------

Within the six-sided dice enchantment, Ye Tian looked at the top ten True Monarchs in front of him, all of them were True Monarchs and True Monarchs, and each of them was wearing top-notch half-way weapon armor and holding half-way weapon blades.

In addition, their strength has increased greatly, but he has been suppressed by seventy percent of his strength, leaving only thirty percent of his strength.

There is not much space here, and once he fights, he can't dodge at all, he can only resist hard.

It stands to reason that he was in a very dangerous situation.

Ye Tian thinks that these ten people definitely have other hole cards, and I am afraid that they will be foolproof.

"Barron's statue, open!"

Bang!

The shadow of a huge Barron statue appeared on Ye Tian's body, and a terrifying aura came out, making Ye Tian's strength stronger and stronger.

The Barron statue can increase his combat power, before when he was a half-step True Spirit, the Barron statue could increase his combat power by ten times, but now that he is at the peak of the True Monarch cultivation, he naturally can't increase his combat power by ten times, but he can also increase his combat power by six times.

With a six-fold increase in combat power, he could completely ignore the suppression of the six-sided dice, and his combat power was suddenly increased to twice the usual combat power.

With twice the combat power, it would not be difficult to kill the ten True Monarchs at all.

However, these true monarchs must have known that he had a strange object that increased his combat power, after all, he deliberately exposed his strange object at the beginning, so many people knew about this information.

Since these five major forces want to deal with him, it is impossible not to consider this issue.

Rumble!!!

The Ten True Monarchs also suddenly appeared with the aura of another strange thing, which is also a strange thing that increases combat power, although it is not as good as the Barron statue, but at least it can increase the combat power by three or four times.

At this moment, Ye Tian's advantage decreased again.

"Kill him!"

The Ten True Monarchs all shot out in unison and fought with Ye Tian in the narrow six-sided dice space.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was in a completely weak position.

Soon, wounds appeared on his body, and blood scattered into the void, almost soaking this six-sided dice space.

If it had been another True Monarch, he would have died a long time ago.

But Ye Tian had cultivated the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, his defensive power was amazing, and his recovery speed was also extremely amazing, almost a true immortal body.

Even though there were many injuries, he recovered in an instant.

"It's hard to kill!"

The Ten True Monarchs frowned.

They pierced through Ye Tian's body and smashed Ye Tian's head, but they couldn't inflict a heavy blow on Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's physique was too terrifying, and his defense was too amazing, some beyond their imagination.

"Don't consume it, there are too many accidents, just use the hole cards!"

A true monarch spoke.

So, a true monarch secretly took out a small arrow.

This is not a pure strange object, but a one-time small arrow created by the Dao Ancestors with a strange object, which is enough to burst out with terrifying lethality in an instant.

With their strength, it would not be difficult to kill a True Ancestor.

Rumble!

The small arrow erupted, locked on Ye Tian, directly pierced Ye Tian, directly shattered half of Ye Tian's body, and also penetrated Ye Tian's body, universe and divine soul, and injured Ye Tian in a real sense.

If there were a few more attacks like this, Ye Tian would really have no way to resist.

"It's so terrifying that he didn't die, such a demon must not live!"

The ten true monarchs have changed their colors.

After all, according to the Dao Ancestors, once this small arrow is used, any True Monarch can be killed, unless there is a specific life-saving artifact.

But Ye Tian didn't use any life-saving strange things just now, and he relied on his own hard resistance to the arrow power of the small arrow.

Just when they were about to continue to use their hole cards, Ye Tian also made a decision.

He must fight back, otherwise if he continues like this, he will not have killed these ten true monarchs, and he will be killed by the hole cards of these true monarchs.

"Three-in-one, you must use this Origin Divine Power!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
